_comment: PRK MPI1 Stencil — 4 MPI ranks. CLI is './stencil <iterations> <n>'.
iterations=8000 with n=4000 targets ~60s at 4 ranks on dev machines.
Per-rank checkpoint cadence is set by env CKPT_EVERY (default 50).
small-low rationale: kill at 30s lands well into the timed loop with several checkpoint boundaries already saved.
